title: Extra Stuff
description: Extra Stuff is a small libary of stuff nobody asked for.
body:
We are excited to announce that this Mod will receive regular updates on a weekly basis. Our dedicated team is committed to enhancing your experience by continually adding new features, content, and improvements with each update. We understand how important it is for players to have fresh and engaging content, and we are working diligently to ensure that this Mod evolves over time.

With every update, you can expect a variety of exciting additions, including new gameplay mechanics, characters, items, and possibly even new quests or challenges to tackle. We take your feedback seriously and are always looking for ways to incorporate your suggestions into future updates, making sure that the Mod remains aligned with the interests and desires of our community.

We genuinely hope that you enjoy exploring the current features of the Mod while eagerly anticipating what’s to come in future updates. Your support is invaluable to us, and we are thrilled to have you on this journey with us. Stay tuned for more information, and make sure to keep an eye out for our weekly updates. Together, let’s create an even more vibrant and enjoyable gaming experience! Thank you for being a part of our community.
